profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Mitra Angkasa Sejahtera Tbk trades nuts and bolts in Indonesia. It provides self-drilling, drywall, tapping, and stainless-steel screws; bolts; hexagon bolts; washers and nuts; and blind rivets. The company offers its products under the FastFix, THE, TMS, Unison, BDS, RJ, UNISON, and other brand names through various outlets, as well as online. In addition, it engages in the retail trade of building goods and materials; and franchises its distributorship. PT Mitra Angkasa Sejahtera Tbk was founded in 2012 and is based in Tangerang, Indonesia.
